candidate_summary: Honey bee waggle dance (compact pose-and-tempo signature encoding angle+distance for one-to-many communication) → compact structured signatures for LLM multi-agent communication
reasoning: Mechanical rule: 10 hits, 3 forced (biology source-domain bee-dance papers). 'Multi-Agent Mark' (2505.21298) explicitly recommends KQML-style structured formats. Survey papers (2502.14321, 2501.06322) catalog the space. PMC12467162 'Bio-Agentic Visual Communication' explicitly bridges biological (including waggle-dance) signaling to UAV swarm agents — direct biomimetic prior art. RoboBee (323904710) implements the biomimetic biology-to-robotics translation already. Verdict FAIL: the bee-waggle-as-AI-multi-agent-communication framing is already in robotics/UAV literature; LLM-multi-agent compact-structured-format is heavily covered.
